---
name: "\U0001F41B Bug Report"
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in ContextFlow
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Console Errors

If applicable, add screenshots or paste any browser console errors (`F12` → Console tab).

## Environment

- **Browser**: (e.g., Chrome 126, Edge 126, Brave 1.67)
- **ContextFlow Version**: (shown in popup footer, e.g., v1.1.0)
- **OS**: (e.g., Windows 11, macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **AI Platform**: (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini)

## Additional Context

Any other details — does it happen every time? Only on certain conversations? Only with long threads?
